hero.title: Know where your cargo is. Live.
hero.subtitle: Yool turns every shipment into a live dot on the map — no more endless calls to the driver and Excel sheets.

pain.title: You spend hours every day on what should just be automatic.
items: Calling the driver to ask "where are you?"
Customer wants a precise ETA — and you guess
Excel sheets and Telegram chats instead of a system
No one remembers who confirmed what
pain.solutionTitle: One screen. Every cargo. In real time.
solutionItems: Live map with every truck and status

features.title: Everything you need to confidently run cargo operations

items.title: Live GPS tracking
items.desc: Each trip is a dot on the map, updating in real time over a secure connection.

items.title: Driver assignment
items.desc: By ID, email, phone or a one-time invite link. A driver joins your team in a minute.

items.title: Pickup & dropoff workflow
items.desc: A transparent path: pickup confirmation, dropoff, photos and signed status changes.

items.title: Push notifications
items.desc: Trip start, route deviations, arrivals — straight to the right person's phone.

items.title: Team & roles
items.desc: Shipper, dispatcher, driver — each gets the right interface and scope.

items.title: History & analytics
items.desc: Full history of trips, statuses and times — the foundation for reports and improvement.

how.title: Three steps from request to control

steps.title: Create the cargo
steps.desc: From, to, what, when. Minimum fields, maximum meaning.

steps.title: Assign a driver
steps.desc: Pick one from your team or send an invite link. The driver sees the trip in the app.

steps.title: Watch on the map
steps.desc: Live dot, ETA, statuses and notifications — for you and your customer.

audiences.title: One product, two sides of logistics

shipper.title: Web dashboard
shipper.desc: Create cargo, manage your team, track trips on a big screen.

carrier.title: Mobile app
carrier.desc: Accept trips, confirm loads, run the track with a single swipe.
carrier.soon: Coming soon to App Store and Google Play

pricing.title: Flexible plans for any fleet
pricing.betaBadge: Beta pricing — locked-in rates for early customers

plans.name: Start
plans.desc: For small teams just trying live tracking.

plans.name: Business
plans.desc: For growing logistics companies and active shippers.

plans.name: Enterprise
plans.desc: For fleets of 50+ trucks, with integrations and SLA.

items.title: Roles & access
items.desc: RBAC: each user sees only what they should.

items.title: Audit log
items.desc: User actions and status changes are recorded and reviewable.

items.title: Hosting region
items.desc: Infrastructure close to your customers and drivers.

items.a: The platform targets Central Asia: Uzbekistan, Kazakhstan and neighbouring countries. Maps and geocoding are tuned for local addresses.
A smartphone with GPS and internet. The app runs in background, uses minimal data, and short connectivity drops don't lose track points.

items.q: What if the driver loses signal on the road?
items.a: Track points are buffered on the device and uploaded automatically as soon as the network is back.
Yes, the Enterprise plan offers API integration — connect your ERP, TMS or in-house system.
Only members of your company with the right role. External partners get a temporary, scoped link.
Custom during the beta. We lock in early-customer pricing for a year.

finalCta.title: Ready to see your cargo live?
finalCta.subtitle: Leave your contact — we'll show the platform on your routes within one business day.

meta.title: Yool — real-time cargo tracking
meta.description: Yool is a B2B platform for shippers and carriers: live map, auto-ETA, driver assignment, trip history. Built for Uzbekistan and Central Asia.
